data.name: Tojima Muốn Trở Thành Kamen Rider
data.original_name: 東島丹三郎は仮面ライダーになりたい
data.overview: Ngay cả khi đã bước sang tuổi 40, Tojima Tanzaburo vẫn tha thiết muốn trở thành một Kamen Rider. Đúng lúc giấc mơ tưởng chừng như không bao giờ thành hiện thực, anh lại vướng vào một loạt vụ cướp khét tiếng lấy cảm hứng từ Shocker... Shibata Yokusaru, tác giả của Air Master và 81 Diver, kể về câu chuyện của những người trưởng thành yêu thích Kamen Rider quá mức, và bắt đầu chơi trò giả vờ... thật!

data.biography:
袁铭喆，原名袁聪宇，中国内地男配音演员，现签约北京光合积木文化传播有限责任公司。

主要配音作品有电视剧《扶摇》江枫，《皓镧传》公子羽、嬴政，《风起霓裳》曹王，《听雪楼》青岚/伽若，《琉璃》乌童，《不说谎恋人》高铭，《两世欢》慕北湮，《长安诺》贺兰克用、萧承孝，《黑色灯塔》陈文彬，《与君歌》严修等；动画《炼气十万年》徐阳，《万古神话》王昊，《伍六七之最强发型师》杰克船长；广播剧《将进酒》萧驰野、《欢迎来到噩梦游戏》宁舟、《提灯映桃花》楚河、《美学公式》丁以楠、《阴阳师》安倍晴明等。2020年，发布角色歌曲《杏花微雨欲沾衣》音源。
data.name: 袁铭喆

data.biography:
袁銘喆，原名袁聰宇，中國內地男配音演員，現簽約北京光合積木文化傳播有限責任公司。

主要配音作品有電視劇《扶搖》江楓，《皓鑭傳》公子羽、嬴政，《風起霓裳》曹王，《聽雪樓》青嵐/伽若，《琉璃》烏童，《不説謊戀人》高銘，《兩世歡》慕北湮，《長安諾》賀蘭克用、蕭承孝，《黑色燈塔》陳文彬，《與君歌》嚴修等；動畫《煉氣十萬年》徐陽，《萬古神話》王昊，《伍六七之最強發型師》傑克船長；廣播劇《將進酒》蕭馳野、《歡迎來到噩夢遊戲》寧舟、《提燈映桃花》楚河、《美學公式》丁以楠、《陰陽師》安倍晴明等。2020 年，發布角色歌曲《杏花微雨欲沾衣》音源。
data.name: 袁銘喆

data.biography:
대한민국의 배우.

군입대 전엔 주로 킹카, 바람둥이, 첫사랑 혹은 짝사랑 캐릭터를 연기했으며, 시트콤 또는 청춘드라마에 출연했다.

제대 후엔 주로 엄친아 실장님 혹은 본부장 캐릭터를 연기했다.

대표작으로 웬만해선 그들을 막을 수 없다, 아내의 유혹, 엄마가 바람났다가 있다.
data.name: 이재황

data.biography: Shohei Komatsu (小松 昌平, Komatsu Shōhei, 14 de abril de 1990) es un actor y seiyū (actor de doblaje) japonés de la prefectura de Fukuoka. Pertenece a Ken Production.
data.name: Shohei Komatsu

data.biography: Shohei Komatsu (小松 昌平, Komatsu Shōhei, April 14, 1990) is a Japanese actor and seiyū (voice actor) from Fukuoka Prefecture. He belongs to Ken Production.
data.name: Shohei Komatsu

data.biography: Teresa Apple Lo (Chinese: 夏萍, 6 October 1937 － 5 August 2019) was a Hong Kong actress.
data.name: Teresa Ha Ping

data.biography:
夏萍（1937年10月6日-2019年8月5日），原名卢少萍。英文名：Teresa，后用Apple，生于中国香港。香港甘草演员、TVB资深艺人。

夏萍二次大战时曾到中国内地居住，至战后回港。1955年，夏萍投考电影公司成为演员，1970年加入邵氏电影拍片13年，1982年加入无线电视。加入电视圈后，演出人母甚至祖母级角色，横跨演艺圈60年，是圈中出名金牌绿叶的老戏骨。2005年在TVB台庆晚会上，夏萍击败汪明荃获得了TVB万千光辉演艺大奖（相当于终身成就奖） [1]  。 [2]  2019年8月5日，夏萍安详离世，享年81岁
data.name: 夏萍

data.biography:
夏萍（1937 年 10 月 6 日 - 2019 年 8 月 5 日），原名盧少萍。英文名：Teresa，後用 Apple，生於香港。香港甘草演員、TVB 資深藝人。

夏萍二次大戰時曾到中國內地居住，至戰後回港。1955 年，夏萍投考電影公司成為演員，1970 年加入邵氏電影拍片 13 年，1982 年加入無線電視。加入電視圈後，演出人母甚至祖母級角色，橫跨演藝圈 60 年，是圈中出名金牌綠葉的老戲骨。2005 年在 TVB 台慶晚會上，夏萍擊敗汪明荃獲得了 TVB 萬千光輝演藝大獎（相當於終身成就獎） 。

2019 年 8 月 5 日，夏萍安詳離世，享年 81 歲
data.name: 夏萍

data.biography:
Teresa Ha ( Chinesisch :夏萍) (6. Oktober 1937 – 5. August 2019) war eine ehemalige chinesische Fernseh- und Filmschauspielerin aus Hongkong. Ha hat in über 260 Filmen mitgewirkt.

Karriere

1956 begann Ha ihre Schauspielkarriere in Hongkong-Filmen. Ha trat zum ersten Mal in The Soul Stealer auf, einem 1956 erschienenen Kriminalfilm unter der Regie von Ng Wui. Ha's letzter Film war I Love You, Mom, ein 2013 erschienener Film unter der Regie von Casey Chan Lai-Ying. Ha hat in über 260 Filmen mitgewirkt.

Ha kam 1982 zu TVB und blieb bis 2016 beim Sender. Sie gewann 2005 bei der TVB-Jubiläumsgala eine Auszeichnung.
data.name: Teresa Ha

data.biography:
Cheung Kwok-Wing (Chinese: 張國榮, English name: Leslie, September 12, 1956 – April 1, 2003) was a Hong Kong Canadian singer and actor.  Born in Hong Kong, Leslie Cheung moved to the United Kingdom in 1971, settling in Leeds, where he enrolled at university to study fashion design. After completing his studies, he returned to Hong Kong and, in 1977, took part in an amateur singing competition—the ATV Asian Music Contest—where he won second prize. The following year, he released his first album, I Like Dreaming. He soon began appearing on television and quickly landed his first film role in Erotic Dreams of the Red Chamber (1978), an erotic production that Cheung himself later described as a “shameful disaster.”

Throughout a 26-year career from 1977 until his death, Cheung released over 40 music albums and acted in 56 films. He was one of the most prominent pioneers that shaped the identity of Cantopop during the 1980s. His studio albums Summer Romance (1987) and Most Beloved (1995) each sold over 300,000 copies and are among the best-selling albums of all time in the territory. In addition to music, Cheung achieved pan-Asian fame with such films as A Better Tomorrow (1986) and A Chinese Ghost Story (1987). He won the Best Actor at the 1991 Hong Kong Film Awards for his role in Days of Being Wild (1990). His venture into acting in the 1990s was recognized for his portrayal of queer characters in the then-conservative film industry, he was one of the few Hong Kong actors willing to take on gay roles—such as in Wong Kar-wai’s Happy Together—or to play a cross-dressing opera performer in Chen Kaige’s Farewell My Concubine, which won the Palme d'Or at Cannes in 1993.  Leslie Cheung died by suicide on April 1, 2003, at the age of 46, by jumping from the 24th floor of the Mandarin Oriental Hotel in Hong Kong. In the note he left behind, he stated that he had been suffering from depression.
data.name: Leslie Cheung

data.biography: 张国荣，籍贯广东梅县，生于香港，是一位在全球华人社会和亚洲地区有影响力的著名演员、歌手和音乐人，大中华地区乐坛和影坛巨星，演艺圈多面发展最成功的代表之一。他是1980年代华语乐坛的殿堂级歌手之一；1991年获香港电影金像奖最佳男主角；1994年凭《霸王别姬》获日本影评人协会最佳外语片男主角，并打破大陆文艺片在美国的票房纪录，成功晋身国际影坛；1999年获香港乐坛最高荣誉“金针奖”。他主演的电影名作有《胭脂扣》、《倩女幽魂》、《阿飞正传》、《霸王别姬》、《东邪西毒》、《春光乍泄》等。
data.name: 张国荣

data.biography: Trương Quốc Vinh là một nam ca sĩ kiêm diễn viên người Canada gốc Hồng Kông. Qua 26 năm sự nghiệp, bắt đầu từ năm 1977 cho đến khi qua đời, Trương Quốc Vinh đã phát hành khoảng 40 album và tham gia diễn xuất trong khoảng 60 bộ phim. Anh là ca sĩ tiên phong, định hình bản sắc cho dòng nhạc Cantopop trong suốt thập niên 1980.[5] Trương Quốc Vinh còn là một biểu tượng của nền điện ảnh Hoa ngữ. Nhiều bộ phim mà anh tham gia diễn xuất như Xuân quang xạ tiết (1997), Bá vương biệt Cơ (1993), A Phi chính truyện (1990), đã trở thành những tác phẩm kinh điển. Anh là một trong số ít ngôi sao châu Á công khai đóng các vai diễn đồng tính nam, tích cực tham gia các hoạt động giành quyền lợi cho cộng đồng LGBT.
data.name: Trương Quốc Vinh

data.biography: 張國榮，籍貫廣東梅縣，生於香港，是一位在全球華人社會和亞洲地區有影響力的著名演員、歌手和音樂人，大中華地區樂壇和影壇巨星，演藝圈多面發展最成功的代表之一。他是 1980 年代華語樂壇的殿堂級歌手之一；1991 年獲香港電影金像獎最佳男主角；1994 年憑《霸王別姬》獲日本影評人協會最佳外語片男主角，並打破大陸文藝片在美國的票房紀錄，成功晉身國際影壇；1999 年獲香港樂壇最高榮譽“金針獎”。他主演的電影名作有《胭脂扣》、《新倩女幽魂》、《阿飛正傳》、《霸王別姬》、《東邪西毒》、《春光乍洩》等。
data.name: 張國榮

data.biography:
Leslie Cheung, né Cheung Fat-chung (張發宗) le 12 septembre 1956 et mort le 1er avril 2003, est un chanteur et acteur chinois de Hong Kong.

Né à Hong Kong, Leslie Cheung vient en Grande-Bretagne en 1971, à Leeds, où il s’inscrit à l’université pour y suivre des études de stylisme. Dès la fin de sa formation universitaire, il revient s’établir à Hong Kong et, en 1977, participe à un concours de chanson pour amateurs, l’ATV Asian Music Contest dans lequel il décroche le second prix. L'année suivante sort son premier album (I Like Dreaming). Il fait ensuite ses premiers pas à la télévision et décroche rapidement un premier rôle au cinéma dans "Erotic Dreams of the Red Chamber" (1978), une production érotique qualifiée par Leslie Cheung lui-même de « désastre indécent ». Puis, le succès arrive avec "Le Syndicat du crime" de John Woo en 1986. Il accumule alors les succès dans sa carrière cinématographique comme dans celle d'un chanteur.

Leslie Cheung est l'un des rares acteurs de Hong Kong à avoir accepté de jouer des rôles gays (Happy Together de Wong Kar-wai) ou le travesti dans le film "Adieu ma concubine" de Chen Kaige, qui a eu la Palme d'Or à Cannes en 1993. Cheung était bisexuel et a déclaré lors d'une entrevue à Time magazine en 2001 : « il est plus approprié de dire que je suis bisexuel. J'ai eu des petites amies. Quand j'avais environ 22 ans, j'ai demandé à ma petite amie Thérèse Mo de m'épouser. » Malgré les nombreuses rumeurs des tabloïds, il nie être homosexuel au début de sa carrière. Après son immigration au Canada, sa position s'est détendue et il déclare publiquement son homosexualité en 1997 (lors d'un de ses concerts) après que des photos de lui et son compagnon aient été publiées dans les tabloïds. Il vivait depuis plus de vingt ans (jusqu'à sa mort) avec un homme, Daffy Tong Hok-Tak (唐鶴德).

Leslie Cheung s'est suicidé le 1er avril 2003, à l'âge de 46 ans, en sautant du 24e étage de l'hôtel Mandarin Oriental de Hong Kong. Dans la note qu'il a laissée, il déclarait souffrir de dépression mentale. Pourtant certains attribuent ce suicide à une peine de cœur, d'autres au fait qu'il aurait contracté le VIH depuis longtemps et que le Sida venait de se déclarer.
data.name: Leslie Cheung

data.biography: Cheung Kwok-Wing (張國榮, nome inglese: Leslie) è stato un cantante e attore canadese di Hong Kong. Nel corso di una carriera di 26 anni, dal 1977 fino alla sua morte, Cheung ha pubblicato oltre 40 album musicali e ha recitato in 56 film. È stato uno dei più importanti pionieri che hanno plasmato l'identità del Cantopop durante gli anni '80 ed è diventato noto per la sua apparizione teatrale stravagante e spesso oltraggiosa. La sua avventura nella recitazione negli anni '90 è stata riconosciuta per la sua interpretazione di personaggi queer nell'allora conservatrice industria cinematografica. La sua carriera è stata segnata sia da elogi che da critiche, con numerose discussioni pubbliche incentrate sul suo orientamento sessuale e sulla sua personalità androgina.
data.name: Leslie Cheung Kwok-Wing

data.biography: 于文文是加拿大华裔女歌手。2013年，担任中韩合拍的校园偶像剧《一又二分之一的夏天》女主角舒晴，与韩国偶像尼坤拍吻戏而走红，2014年发行首张个人专辑《斗志》。

data.name: 於文文

data.biography:
Michael Newman (April 26, 1957 - October 20, 2024) was an American actor and firefighter, known as the beloved lifeguared Mike "Newmie" Newman on television series Baywatch, and was the only cast member with real-life lifeguarding experience. Over the course of the show’s 1989 -2001 run, he appeared in 150 episodes — second only to David Hasselhoff.  He also served as a full-time firefighter, balancing his duties at the firehouse with his filming schedule. After the series concluded, he continued firefighting for another 25 years before retiring.

Newman died from his long battle with Parkinson's disease since he was diagnosed in 2006.
data.name: Michael Newman

data.biography:
Lucas Bravo is a French actor and model. He is known for starring in the Netflix romantic comedy series Emily in Paris as chef Gabriel, Emily's downstairs neighbor and love interest.

He is the son of the retired French footballer Daniel Bravo and singer Eva Bravo.
data.name: Lucas Bravo

data.biography: Ο Λούκας Μπράβο (Lucas Bravo) είναι Γάλλος ηθοποιός. Είναι περισσότερο γνωστός για τον πρωταγωνιστή στη ρομαντική κωμική σειρά του Netflix, Emily στο Παρίσι. Είναι επίσης γνωστός για τους κινηματογραφικούς του ρόλους στην κωμωδία-δράμα Mrs. Harris Goes to Paris και τις ρομαντικές κωμωδίες Ticket to Paradise και The Honeymoon.
data.name: Λούκας Μπράβο

data.biography: 高至霆，1995年6月1日出生于黑龙江哈尔滨，中国内地男演员，毕业于中央戏剧学院2013级表演系本科班，2015年凭借电影《薄荷》正式出道，因在《致我们单纯的小美好》中饰演吴柏松被大众熟知，后续出演《悍城》《超越》《小城故事多》《北上》《六姊妹》等多部作品，以硬朗外形与扎实演技塑造多样角色，2023年获第九届文荣奖十佳青年演员。
data.name: 高至霆

data.biography: 高至霆（1995 年 6 月 1 日—），中國大陸男演員。
data.name: 高至霆

data.biography:
Mackenyu (新田 真剣佑, born November 16, 1996) is a Japanese actor born in Los Angeles, California. He is the son of actor and martial artist Sonny Chiba. He attended Beverly Hills High School in their Advanced Placement Program and appeared in a few films and TV shows while growing up. As a young child, Mackenyu had many interests including horseback riding, Yabusame, Kyokushin Karate (he was placed third at the US Kyokushin Karate Nationals), gymnastics, water polo, and wrestling (for which he became the school representative). He was also into music, playing piano since he was 10 years old, and later participated in the brass band of his high school in Beverly Hills, playing saxophone, and flute.

At the age of 15, Mackenyu watched a movie of Haruma Miura and got inspired to pursue acting professionally in Japan. He held on to the dream of co-starring with the actor once he established his career, which then came true in the movie adaptation of Gunjō Senki (2021). Mackenyu landed his first feature film lead role in Take a Chance (2015) and was featured in the acclaimed short movie Tadaima (2015) for which he won a best supporting actor award at the Asians of Films festival. He moved to Japan later in the same year.

His fame grew in Japan after landing the role of Eiji Tomari in Kamen Rider Drive: Surprise Future (2015). In 2016, he made his stage debut in the Japanese musical Boys Over Flower (Hana Yori Dango: The Musical), which prepared him for his future major roles in the stage-musicals ZEROTOPIA (2018) and Hoshi no Daichi ni Furu Namida (2020). He had a prominent role in the two part feature film Chihayafuru Part I & II (2016) which made him a big name in Japan. Mackenyu started to expand his acting opportunities in Hollywood with a supporting role in the film Pacific Rim: Uprising (2018). In 2021, he starred as the final villain, Yukishiro Enishi, in the Rurouni Kenshin series. He portrayed Scar in the live-action sequel of Fullmetal Alchemist (2022). He gained global popularity when he landed the role of Roronoa Zoro in the live-action series adaptation of One Piece (2023). Drawing on his martial arts background, Mackenyu performs his own stunts and is highly skilled in sword fighting.
data.name: Mackenyu

data.biography: 真剑佑（ 真剣佑），1996年11月16日出生于美国洛杉矶，日本男演员，千叶真一的儿子，目前作为演员活跃在电视领域。  2014年，出演日剧SP《世界奇妙物语2014年秋之特别篇》。2015年，主演漫画改编的真人版电影《花牌情缘》上下篇 。2016年出演热血校园剧《敬仰吾师》，饰演木藤良莲。2017年，5月从父亲所属的个人事务所转到新事务所topcoat，并改名为新田真剑佑；出演漫改电影《JOJO的奇妙冒险：不灭钻石第一章》、励志青春电影《Cheer☆Dance~女高中生用啦啦队舞蹈征服全美的真实故事~》和羽住英一郎导演最新作《OVER DRIVE》；参演新剧《是我们干的（仆たちがやりました）》。
data.name: 新田真剑佑

data.biography: Né le 16 novembre 1996 à Los Angeles, Mackenyu Arata, de son vrai nom Mackenyu Maeda, est un acteur américano-japonais fils de la légende du cinéma japonais Sonny Chiba. Pratiquant les arts martiaux dès l'enfance, il s'installe au Japon à l'adolescence pour y poursuivre une carrière d'acteur. Il se fait remarquer dès 2016 avec la trilogie *Chihayafuru*, qui lui vaut le Prix du meilleur nouvel acteur aux Japan Academy Prize 2017. Il enchaîne ensuite les adaptations de mangas en prises de vues réelles, dont *Kenshin : L'Achèvement* (2021). En 2023, il incarne Seiya dans *Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque* puis Roronoa Zoro dans la série Netflix *One Piece*, succès mondial qui le propulse sur la scène internationale. Reconnu pour ses capacités martiales, il réalise lui-même ses cascades.
data.name: Mackenyu Arata

data.biography: Mackenyu Maeda (前田 真剣佑 Maeda, Mackenyu?) (Los Ángeles, California, 16 de noviembre de 1996), conocido como Mackenyu, es un actor japonés. Es conocido por su participación en producciones como Over Drive (2018), Samurai X: El fin, y One Piece (2023).
data.name: Mackenyu

data.biography:
💥Маккэнъю Арата. Родился в 1996-ом году в Лос-Анджелесе, Калифорния, США. Рос в семье со старшей сестрой и младшим братом. Отец работал мастером боевых искусств, а мать была актрисой. Учился в средней школе Беверли-Хиллз и колледже Пасадена-Сити. Работает актёром. С 2023-го женат, у пары 1 сын, имя которого не раскрывается

🏆Главные награды🏆: Japan Academy Film Prize (2017) [Chihayafuru]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «One Piece. Большой Куш» (2023), «Рыцари Зодиака» (2023), «Тихоокеанский рубеж 2» (2018)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Маккэнъю с детства профессионально занимался каратэ и владеет чёрным поясом, а большинство боевых сцен в фильмах предпочитает выполнять самостоятельно без дублёров
data.name: Маккэнъю Арата

data.biography: Joo Se Bin is a South Korean actress. She was a member of the K-pop girl group "Tiny-G" until 2014. She was also a contestant on the survival program "Idol School", ranking on 27th place. Previously she worked under her real name, Kim Myung Ji until she signed a contract with a new agency, ANDMARQ in September 2022 and changed to stage name then.
data.name: Joo Se-Bin

data.biography: Joo Se Bin é uma atriz sul-coreana. Ela foi membro do grupo feminino de K-pop 'Tiny-G' até 2014. Ela também participou do programa de sobrevivência 'Idol School', ficando em 27º lugar. Anteriormente, ela trabalhou com seu nome verdadeiro, Kim Myung Ji, até assinar um contrato com uma nova agência, ANDMARQ, em setembro de 2022, e mudou para nome artístico.

Hwang Jun-su is a model and commercial talent represented by Insight Entertainment. His work spans editorial photoshoots, fashion runways, and TV and online advertisements. In 2024, Junsu expanded his on-stage presence as an emcee for Mister International 2024.
data.name: Hwang Jun-su

data.biography:
Sam Reid, born on February 19, 1987, in New South Wales, Australia, is a actor known for his captivating performances in film and television. He grew up on a cattle property in the Monaro region and developed a passion for acting at a young age. Reid pursued his craft at the London Academy of Music and Dramatic Art (LAMDA), graduating in 2010 as the star student of his year.

Reid gained recognition for his role as Lestat de Lioncourt in the AMC series Interview with the Vampire (2022–present), earning critical acclaim. He has also starred in notable productions such as The Newsreader (2021–2025), Lambs of God (2019), and the period drama Belle (2013), where he played John Davinier.
data.name: Sam Reid

data.overview: Cuộc cách mạng Palestine 1936, hay còn gọi là Cuộc Nổi dậy Ả Rập Lớn (Great Arab Revolt), là một cuộc nổi dậy vũ trang và đình công quy mô lớn của người Palestine chống lại sự cai trị của Anh và làn sóng nhập cư Do Thái, kéo dài từ 1936-1939, dẫn đến bạo lực leo thang, thiệt hại nặng nề về người và của, bị Anh đàn áp dã man bằng quân sự.
data.title: Palestine 36

data.biography:
Jessica Chancellor is an American actress. She is known for her works in movies and TV series such as Mystery Incorporated, The Final Level” Escaping Rancala, and many more.

She has also been involved in other aspects of the film industry and has worked alongside various personalities. She is also a cosplayer and has played many characters and attended many Comicons. She mainly takes to social media to share her interest and has been able to gain a large number of followers.
data.name: Jessica Chancellor

data.biography: Chang Chang, formerly known as Chang Lufeng, was born in August 1975. In 1997, he won the championship in the "National Talents Rookie" film and television actor selection competition held by Singapore National TV. Signed a Singapore National TV station, and the representative is "East Travel Notes" (Han Xiangzi). After the contract with the original owner in 2001, he signed a contract with Shanghai Hezhan Film and Television Co., Ltd., officially in the name of "常铖" in the TV series "Half-Life" as the male No. 2 Xu Shuhui. After the male No. 1 starred in the series "Love is a little bit more than hate." Other works include: "Six Fingers Devil", "Double Cannon", "My Naughty Angel" and so on. In December 1999, he released his first album.
data.name: Chang Cheng

data.biography: 常铖，原名常鲁峰，生于1975年8月。1997年在新加坡国家电视台举办的“才华横溢出新秀”影视演员选拔大赛中获冠军。签约新加坡国家电视台，代表作《东游记》（饰韩湘子）。2001年与原东家约满后，签约上海和展影视公司，正式以“常铖”的名字在电视剧《半生缘》中担任男二号许叔惠。后以男一号出演连续剧《爱比恨多一点》。其它作品还有：《六指琴魔》《双响炮》《我的淘气天使》等。
data.name: 常铖

data.biography: 常鋮，原名常魯峯，生於 1975 年 8 月。1997 年在新加坡國家電視台舉辦的“才華橫溢出新秀”影視演員選拔大賽中獲冠軍。簽約新加坡國家電視台，代表作《東遊記》（飾韓湘子）。2001 年與原東家約滿後，簽約上海和展影視公司，正式以“常鋮”的名字在電視劇《半生緣》中擔任男二號許叔惠。後以男一號出演聯續劇《愛比恨多一點》。其它作品還有：《六指琴魔》《雙響炮》《我的淘氣天使》等。
data.name: 常鋮
